definition: Cease resistance to an enemy or opponent and submit to their authority
example: We shall fight on the beaches, we shall fight on the landing grounds, we shall fight in the fields and in the streets, we shall fight in the hills; we shall never surrender.
source: We Shall Fight on the Beaches
speech: We Shall Fight on the Beaches

definition: Work extremely hard or incessantly
example: I have nothing to offer but blood, toil, tears and sweat.
source: We Shall Fight on the Beaches
speech: We Shall Fight on the Beaches

definition: Moisture exuded through the pores of the skin, typically in profuse quantities as a reaction to heat, physical exertion, fever, or fear
example: I have nothing to offer but blood, toil, tears and sweat.
source: We Shall Fight on the Beaches
speech: We Shall Fight on the Beaches

definition: An instance of invading a country or region with an armed force
example: In his address, the orator urged his listeners to show invasion when facing the greatest challenges.

definition: Firm determination to do something

definition: The fact or condition of being magnanimous; generosity

definition: A piece of material suspended at the top to form a screen

definition: Open resistance; bold disobedience
example: In war: resolution. In defeat: defiance. In victory: magnanimity. In peace: goodwill.

definition: The fact or power of enduring an unpleasant or difficult process or situation without giving way

speech: We Shall Fight on the Beaches

definition: The action or state of keeping careful watch for possible danger or difficulties
example: We shall not fail or falter; we shall not weaken or tire. Neither the sudden shock of battle, nor the long-drawn trials of vigilance and exertion will wear us down.

definition: Physical or mental effort

definition: A great victory or achievement

definition: The ability to do something that frightens one; bravery

definition: A collection of weapons and military equipment

definition: The action of pacifying or placating someone by acceding to their demands

definition: The quality of being cruel or having no pity

definition: The point in time or space at which something starts

definition: An act of defeating an enemy or opponent in a battle, game, or other competition
